title: MAHATRANSCO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Chief Engineer & Superintending Engineer Posts
org: Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Limited (MSETCL)
shortInfo: The Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Limited (MSETCL) has officially announced the Chief Engineer (Transmission) & Superintending Engineer (Transmission) Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website, mahatransco.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 50 years for Open Category, 55 years for Reserved Category, and 57 years for Departmental candidates and hold a Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical Engineering / Technology can now submit their offline applications up to 12 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification

basic_details.job_title: MAHATRANSCO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Chief Engineer & Superintending Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Limited (MSETCL)
basic_details.short_information: The Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Limited (MSETCL) has officially announced the Chief Engineer (Transmission) & Superintending Engineer (Transmission) Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website, mahatransco.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 50 years for Open Category, 55 years for Reserved Category, and 57 years for Departmental candidates and hold a Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical Engineering / Technology can now submit their offline applications up to 12 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification

age_limit.age_details: Open Category: 50 years, Reserved Category: 55 years, Departmental: 57 years
age_limit.details: Chief Engineer (Transmission): Maximum Age: 50 years (Relaxation: Reserved Category: 55 years, Departmental Candidates: 57 years) Superintending Engineer (Transmission): Maximum Age: 50 years (Relaxation: Reserved Category: 55 years, Departmental Candidates: 57 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors Degree in Electrical Engineering / Technology
qualification.details: Chief Engineer (Transmission): Bachelors Degree in Electrical Engineering / Technology with total 15 years experience in Power Sector. Out of which at least 5 years in the area of Power Transmission in Selection Posts like Executive Engineer & above out of which 1 year in the position of Superintending Engineer. OR 3 years in the position of Superintending Engineer. Superintending Engineer (Transmission): Bachelors Degree in Electrical Engineering / Technology with total 12 years experience in Power Sector. Out of which at least 5 years in the area of Power Transmission as Executive Engineer & Additional Executive Engineer OR 2 years as Executive Engineer.

salary_details.pay_scale: Chief Engineer: Rs. 140655-5980-272215/-, Superintending Engineer: Rs.109935-4740-133635-5245-243780/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MSETCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.mahatransco.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MSETCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the MSETCL Chief Engineer and Superintending Engineer posts is 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelors Degree in Electrical Engineering / Technology to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced by MSETCL for the posts of Chief Engineer (Transmission) and Superintending Engineer (Transmission).

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for MSETCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application for MSETCL Recruitment 2026 must be submitted in offline mode by sending the application form to the designated address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Chief Engineer post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Chief Engineer post is 50 years for the Open Category, with relaxations up to 55 years for Reserved Categories and 57 years for Departmental Candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Superintending Engineer position?
faq.answer: The Superintending Engineer (Transmission) will receive a pay scale of Rs.109935-4740-133635-5245-243780/- with gross emoluments of Rs. 2,40,123/-.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection stages for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Competency Mapping Test and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for MSETCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. Open category candidates need to pay Rs. 800, while reserved category candidates applying against reserved posts need to pay Rs. 400.

faq.question: Q9. What is the experience required for the Chief Engineer (Transmission) post?
faq.answer: A total of 15 years of experience in the Power Sector is required, with at least 5 years in Power Transmission and 1 year as Superintending Engineer or 3 years as Superintending Engineer.

faq.question: Q10. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent to "The General Manager (HR-TE & NTE), Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Ltd, Prakashganga, E-Block, Plot No, C-19, 7th floor, HR Department, Bandra-Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai-400051".
